name: planning
description: Structured implementation planning, interactive annotation review, and autonomous plan execution

external_review_cmd.title: External review command
external_review_cmd.description: Command for external code review tool. Leave empty to auto-detect codex.

task_retries.title: Task retries
task_retries.description: Number of retries for failed tasks before stopping.

review_iterations.title: Review iterations
review_iterations.description: Max fix-and-recheck cycles during internal review.

external_review_iterations.title: External review iterations
external_review_iterations.description: Max iterations for external review adversarial loop.

finalize_enabled.title: Enable finalize
finalize_enabled.description: Whether to run the finalize phase (rebase and squash commits).

plans_dir.title: Plans directory
plans_dir.description: Directory where plan files are located, relative to project root.
